series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all of the documentation related to the administrative review of response to resistance cases (including pursuit). This series includes the OHP 1166, “Response to Resistance Review Guide and Committee Findings”, and any appended documentation, including correspondence on the findings and recommendations of the committee or reviewing supervisors. All documentation shall be stored in Employee Incident Reporting (EIR) database.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for two (2) years plus current, then delete. If attached to an administrative investigation, records in this series will assume that retention period. ; Paper: Scan all paper documents into EIR and destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
